name: goose-notes-native
description: Native macOS notebook with an AppKit shell and a BlockNote WKWebView editor

scripts.build:web: bun run tokens && vite build --config Web/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:native: bun run project && xcodebuild -project GooseNotes.xcodeproj -scheme GooseNotes -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath .build/DerivedData CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- build
scripts.test:native: bun run project && xcodebuild -project GooseNotes.xcodeproj -scheme GooseNotes -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath .build/DerivedData -destination 'platform=macOS,arch=arm64' CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- build-for-testing && xcrun xctest .build/DerivedData/Build/Products/Debug/GooseNotesTests.xctest
scripts.check:web: bun run build:web && bun run tokens:check && bun run typecheck
scripts.check: bun run audit:boundaries && bun run check:web && bun run test:native
